allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/routes/forum.js'\).then\(m => console.log\('forum route loaded:', typeof m.default\)\).catch\(e => { console.error\('LOAD ERROR:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\) }\)")
